description: Absurdist fantasy scheduling: standups in zero gravity, all-hands on Mars, annual review in the year 3000. All physically impossible and clearly humorous. The real conversation pivot is about a vendor email with no specific scheduling.

mock_llm_response.summary: No actionable calendar events found. The scheduling references (space station standups, Mars all-hands, year 3000 annual review) are absurdist humor. The real conversation topic (vendor server upgrade) results in a vague 'next quarter' mention with no specific date or commitment.

notes: Impossible/absurd scheduling locations and times mark clearly non-actionable events. The vendor follow-up mention ('next quarter', 'once they send the formal quote') is too vague to constitute a schedulable event.
